Name: Stryfe
Description: Scott Summers was dealing with the death of his true love, Jean Grey, when he found a new life with Madelyne Pryor. The two were married and had a child, Nathan Summers, who would go on to become Cable. Nathan was a child of prophecy - to bring an end to the evil known as Apocalypse. In reacting to this, Apocalypse infected the child with the Techno-Organic Virus, giving the child a death sentence. After the defeat of Apocalypse by the first incarnation of X-Factor at Apocalypse’s moon fortress, a stranger named Askani appeared before Scott and Jean (who had earlier reappeared alive and well, leading Scott to leave Madelyne).
